  | nil => simp [partialSums_nil, findIdx_nil]
  | cons l L ih =>
    cases le_or_lt i l.length <;>
    simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, *] at * <;>
    simp [*, flatten_cons, take_append, take_left, take_right, Nat.sub_zero] <;>
    try { omega }

    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (0 :: (L.map length).partialSums.map (l.length + ·)) = 1 := by
        simp [findIdx_eq] <;> omega
      simp [this, Nat.sub_one, Nat.zero_sub, take_nil, getD_nil, Nat.add_zero]
      cases le_or_lt i l.length <;> simp [*]

        intro n hn
        cases n <;> simp_all
        omega
      simp [this, Nat.add_sub_cancel, take_append, ih]
      cases le_or_lt i l.length <;> simp_all

cases le_or_lt i L.flatten.length
  case inl hle =>
    have h : i < L.flatten.length + 1 := Nat.lt_succ_of_le hle
    revert h
    revert i
    induction L with
    | nil => intro i _; simp
    | cons l L ih =>
      intro i h
      simp [flatten_cons, take_append]
      split
      case inl h' =>
        have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length (l :: L)).partialSums = 1 := by
          simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons]
          rw [findIdx_eq] <;> grind
        simp [this]
        simp [h']
      case inr h' =>
        have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (map length (l :: L)).partialSums =
            findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums + 1 := by
          simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]
          congr
          funext x
          grind
        simp [this]
        specialize ih (i - l.length)
        have : i - l.length < L.flatten.length + 1 := by
          omega
        rw [ih this]
        simp [take_cons, Nat.sub_sub]
        omega
  case inr hgt =>
    exfalso
    have : L.flatten.length ≤ i := by omega
    have : (L.map length).sum ≤ i := by
      simp [← length_flatten]
    have : (L.map length).partialSums.getLast? = some (L.map length).sum := by
      simp
    have : (L.map length).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) = (L.map length).partialSums.length := by
      apply findIdx_eq_length
      intro x hx
      have : x ≤ (L.map length).sum := by
        apply partialSums_getElem_le_last
        exact hx
      omega
    simp [this]
    have : j = L.length - 1 := by
      simp [*]
    have : (L.take j).flatten = L.flatten := by
      rw [this]
      simp [take_all]
    have : k = i - L.flatten.length := by
      simp [*]
    have : k = 0 := by
      omega
    simp [*]
    omega

      · congr; funext x; simp [Nat.add_comm]
      · congr; funext x; simp [Nat.add_comm]

    split <;> simp [Nat.sub_zero, Nat.zero_add]
    · have : j = 0 := by simp [*]; omega
      simp [*]
      have : k = i := by simp [*]
      simp [*]
      rw [take_append]
      split <;> simp [Nat.le_of_lt]
    · have : j = findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - length l)) (map length L).partialSums := by

      simp [*] at *

        simp [*]
      simp [*]
      rw [take_append]
      split <;> simp [Nat.le_of_lt]
      · exfalso
        omega
      · rfl

      omega
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (0 :: (L.map length).partialSums.map (l.length + ·)) =
        findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (L.map length).partialSums + 1 := by
        simp [findIdx_cons]
        congr
        funext x
        simp [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
      simp [this]
      rw [ih]
      simp [take_cons, Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_not_lt h)]

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp [partialSums_nil, findIdx_nil]
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, map_cons, partialSums_cons, take_append]
    split_ifs with h
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (0 :: (L.map length).partialSums.map (l.length + ·)) = 1 := by
        simp [findIdx_cons, h]
      simp [this]
      omega
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (0 :: (L.map length).partialSums.map (l.length + ·)) =
        findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (L.map length).partialSums + 1 := by
        simp [findIdx_cons, h]
        congr
        funext x
        simp [Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]
      simp [this]
      rw [ih]
      simp [take_cons, getElem?_cons, Option.getD]
      split <;> simp_all

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp [partialSums_nil, findIdx_nil]
  | cons l L ih =>
    cases le_or_lt i l.length with
    | inl hle =>
      have : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums = 0 :: (map length L).partialSums.map (l.length + ·) := by
        simp [partialSums_cons]
      rw [this]
      simp [findIdx_cons, hle]
      simp [Nat.sub_zero, take_cons, Nat.zero_le]
    | inr hlt =>
      have : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums = 0 :: (map length L).partialSums.map (l.length + ·) := by
        simp [partialSums_cons]
      rw [this]
      simp [findIdx_cons, hlt]
      have hj : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums ≤ (map length L).length := by
        apply findIdx_le_length
      simp [ih (i := i - l.length), Nat.sub_sub, Nat.add_sub_cancel_left, take_cons, hlt.le]
      omega

induction L with
  | nil => simp [findIdx_nil, partialSums_nil]
  | cons l L ih =>
    simp only [flatten_cons, map_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, take_cons]
    split <;> rename_i h
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (0 :: (L.map length).partialSums.map (l.length + ·)) = 1 := by
        simp [findIdx_eq] <;> omega
      simp [this]
    · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (0 :: (L.map length).partialSums.map (l.length + ·)) =
        findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - l.length)) (L.map length).partialSums + 1 := by
        simp [findIdx_eq]
        funext x
        split <;> omega
      simp [this]
      rw [ih]
      simp [Nat.sub_sub]
      congr 1
      omega

cases i
  case zero => simp
  case succ i =>
    induction L with
    | nil => simp
    | cons l L ih =>
      simp only [flatten_cons, map_cons, partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons]
      split_ifs with h
      · simp [findIdx_eq] at h
        omega
      · have : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i.succ)) (map length L).partialSums = 
          findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i.succ - l.length)) (map length L).partialSums := by
          congr
          funext x
          simp [Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le]
          omega
        simp only [this]
        rw [ih]
        simp [take_append, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
        split_ifs <;> simp_all

induction L generalizing i with
  | nil => simp [partialSums_nil, findIdx_nil]
  | cons l L ih =>
    cases le_or_lt i l.length with
    | inl hle =>
      have : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) = 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons]
        rw [findIdx_eq] <;> simp [hle]
      simp [this]
      simp [take_append, hle]
    | inr hlt =>
      have : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) =
          (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i - l.length) + 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]
        congr
        funext x
        simp [Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le (le_of_lt hlt)]
      simp [this]
      rw [ih (i := i - l.length)]
      simp [take_append, Nat.add_sub_cancel_left, hlt]

cases L with
  | nil => simp [partialSums_nil, findIdx_nil]
  | cons l L =>
    have h₁ : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums = 0 :: (map length L).partialSums.map (length l + ·) := by
      simp [partialSums_cons]
    rw [h₁]
    have h₂ : findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i)) (0 :: (map length L).partialSums.map (length l + ·)) =
        if i < length l then 1 else
          findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - length l)) (map length L).partialSums + 1 := by
      simp [findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]
      split <;> simp [Nat.lt_succ_iff, Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le]
      · intro h
        have : ∀ x, (length l + x > i) ↔ (x > i - length l) := by
          intro x
          omega
        simp [this]
      · intro h
        have : ∀ x, (length l + x > i) ↔ (x > i - length l) := by
          intro x
          omega
        simp [this]
    rw [h₂]
    split <;> simp [Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le]
    · intro h
      have : j = 0 := by
        simp [*]
        omega
      rw [this]
      simp [take_cons, Nat.sub_zero]
      have : k = i := by
        simp [*]
      rw [this]
      simp [take_append, min_eq_left (by omega)]
    · intro h
      have : j = findIdx (fun x => decide (x > i - length l)) (map length L).partialSums := by
        simp [*]
        omega
      rw [this]
      have : k = i - length l - (L.take j).flatten.length := by
        simp [*]
        omega
      rw [this]
      simp [take_cons, take_append, min_eq_right (by omega)]
      rw [take_flatten L (i - length l)]
      simp [flatten_cons, take_append, min_eq_right (by omega)]

induction L with
  | nil => simp [findIdx_nil, partialSums_nil]
  | cons l L ih =>
    cases le_or_lt i l.length with
    | inl hle =>
      have : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) = 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons]
        rw [findIdx_eq] <;> simp [hle]
      simp [this]
      simp [take_append, min_eq_left hle]
    | inr hlt =>
      have : (map length (l :: L)).partialSums.findIdx (· > i) =
          (map length L).partialSums.findIdx (· > i - l.length) + 1 := by
        simp [partialSums_cons, findIdx_cons, Function.comp_def]
        congr
        funext x
        simp [Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le (le_of_lt hlt)]
      simp [this]
      rw [take_append, min_eq_right (le_of_lt hlt)]
      rw [ih]
      congr
      · omega
      · simp [take_cons, Nat.sub_sub_self (le_of_lt hlt)]
